title: Mars, God of War
writer: Marcello Baldi, Sandro Continenza, Ernesto Gastaldi
actors: Roger Browne, Jocelyn Lane, Linda Sini
plot: The king of Telbia defeats an African army through the intervention of the war god Mars. Remaining on Earth, Mars falls in love with the human girl Daphne, but she is forced to become a priestess in the temple of Venus.
